mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_stats ( stat_date, stat_type, total_news, total_news_article, total_news_video, total_alert, total_alert_article, total_alert_video, total_case, case_in_progress, case_finished, case_conversion_rate, today_news, today_news_article, today_news_video, today_news_yoy, today_alert, today_alert_yoy, today_alert_level1, today_alert_level2, today_alert_level3 ) VALUES ( #{statDate}, #{statType}, #{totalNews}, #{totalNewsArticle}, #{totalNewsVideo}, #{totalAlert}, #{totalAlertArticle}, #{totalAlertVideo}, #{totalCase}, #{caseInProgress}, #{caseFinished}, #{caseConversionRate}, #{todayNews}, #{todayNewsArticle}, #{todayNewsVideo}, #{todayNewsYoy}, #{todayAlert}, #{todayAlertYoy}, #{todayAlertLevel1}, #{todayAlertLevel2}, #{todayAlertLevel3} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_news = VALUES(total_news), total_news_article = VALUES(total_news_article), total_news_video = VALUES(total_news_video), total_alert = VALUES(total_alert), total_alert_article = VALUES(total_alert_article), total_alert_video = VALUES(total_alert_video), total_case = VALUES(total_case), case_in_progress = VALUES(case_in_progress), case_finished = VALUES(case_finished), case_conversion_rate = VALUES(case_conversion_rate), today_news = VALUES(today_news), today_news_article = VALUES(today_news_article), today_news_video = VALUES(today_news_video), today_news_yoy = VALUES(today_news_yoy), today_alert = VALUES(today_alert), today_alert_yoy = VALUES(today_alert_yoy), today_alert_level1 = VALUES(today_alert_level1), today_alert_level2 = VALUES(today_alert_level2), today_alert_level3 = VALUES(today_alert_level3), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO dashboard_trend (stat_date, news_count, alert_count) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{newsCount}, #{alertCount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE news_count = VALUES(news_count), alert_count = VALUES(alert_count)

INSERT INTO dashboard_platform_stats (stat_date, stat_type, source, sensitive_count, neutral_count, normal_count, total_count) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{statType}, #{source}, #{sensitiveCount}, #{neutralCount}, #{normalCount}, #{totalCount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sensitive_count = VALUES(sensitive_count), neutral_count = VALUES(neutral_count), normal_count = VALUES(normal_count), total_count = VALUES(total_count)
INSERT INTO dashboard_region_stats (stat_date, stat_type, region, news_count) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{statType}, #{region}, #{newsCount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE news_count = VALUES(news_count)

INSERT INTO dashboard_hot_words (stat_date, stat_type, word, word_count, word_type) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{statType}, #{word}, #{wordCount}, #{wordType}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE word_count = VALUES(word_count)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dashboard_hot_words WHERE stat_date = #{statDate} AND stat_type = #{statType}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE article_type != 'video' OR article_type IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE article_type = 'video'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE (article_type != 'video' OR article_type IS NULL) AND alert_id IS NOT NULL AND alert_id != 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE article_type = 'video' AND alert_id IS NOT NULL AND alert_id != 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{today}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{today} AND article_type = 'video'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{yesterday}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_data WHERE alert_id IS NOT NULL AND alert_id != 0

SELECT n.source, SUM(CASE WHEN c.sensitivity_level >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sensitiveCount, SUM(CASE WHEN c.sensitivity_level = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS neutralCount, SUM(CASE WHEN c.sensitivity_level = 0 OR c.sensitivity_level IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normalCount, COUNT(1) AS totalCount FROM news_data n LEFT JOIN clear_data c ON n.news_id = c.news_id WHERE DATE(n.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND n.source IS NOT NULL GROUP BY n.source ORDER BY totalCount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT region, COUNT(1) AS newsCount FROM news_data WHERE DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND region IS NOT NULL AND region != '' GROUP BY region ORDER BY newsCount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT source AS word, COUNT(1) AS wordCount FROM news_data WHERE DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND source IS NOT NULL AND source != '' GROUP BY source ORDER BY wordCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
